original_statement: how many players participated in the weightlifting sport?
mutated_statement: how many people did something in the activity?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作模糊化 + 领域泛化: “players” 被泛化为更宽泛的 “people” | “participated in” 被替换为模糊动作 “did something in” | “the weightlifting sport” 被泛化为模糊名词 “the activity” (players → people | participated in → did something in | the weightlifting sport → the activity)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处critique和judge_thought识别关键信息：critique 多次指出“does not interpret the ambiguous terms ‘something’ and ‘the activity’”，并在最终iteration的after_refine中，agent在thought中明确写出“Interpret ‘did something in the activity’ as athletes who actually competed…”，随后给出具体答案14。表现上，agent先被批评未处理模糊性，随后显式说明了自己的假设并据此计算出一个具体数值。因为agent既承认并描述了问题的歧义，又在缺乏进一步澄清的情况下基于合理假设给出具体答案，故归类为“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”。
